log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable with GUI capabilities, signed, and has persistence features. It has been analyzed in multiple sandboxes.
The sample does not appear to have any network activity, but it has dropped 10 files and created 10 processes. It also has 5 registry persistence keys. The highlighted API call is SetWindowsHookExA.

The sample creates 10 processes, including v4barsvc.exe, v4brmon.exe, v4highin.exe, and v4setup.pe32. It also loads several modules, including npv4stub.dll, t8res.dll, and v4brstub.dll. The highlighte
The sample drops 10 files, including DLLs and EXEs, with various hashes. These files are likely related to the DictionaryBoss malware.

The sample creates 5 registry persistence keys, including entries for DictionaryBoss Search Scope Monitor and DictionaryBoss Browser Plugin Loader. These keys are likely used to maintain persistence o
The CAPA sandbox has identified 13 MITRE ATT&CK techniques and 32 signature matches. This suggests that the sample exhibits a range of malicious behaviors.
The sample exhibits a range of malicious behaviors, including file and registry manipulation, process termination, and system information discovery.
